pendingApplications.address: Land North Of Station Road Stanstead Abbotts Hertfordshire
pendingApplications.proposal: Outline planning application (including details of access) for up to 200 dwellings to include affordable housing (Use Class C3), public open space and associated infrastructure (with matters relating to appearance, landscaping, layout and scale reserved)

pendingApplications.address: Land West Of Wadesmill Road Hertford Bengeo
pendingApplications.proposal: Non-material amendment to reference: 3/23/1642/FUL (as amended by reference: 3/25/1356/NMA) for Erection of 118 dwellings, including access roads, cycle and pedestrian routes, cycle and car parking, public open space, landscaping, tree protection measures, sustainable urban drainage system (SuDS) and associated ancillary structures. Amendments to include: alteration of entrance lobby for Blocks A and B (Plots 1 - 12) and associated amendment to parking layout.

Variation of Condition 2 (approved plans) pursuant to planning permission (ref: 3/24/0668/FUL/Dated 10/01/2025) for (Demolition of the existing dwelling property and outbuildings. Erection of two blocks comprising a total of 5 flats and 2 one and a half storey dwellings with parking, access and landscaping). The amendments include changes to the 5-flat block: building footprint alterations, rearrangement of fenestration, double storey front, rear and side additions to add first and second floor space, alterations to the roof with removal of the green roof, internal alterations to increase bedrooms and flat sizes, alterations to the materials, external landscaping and associated site changes.

pendingApplications.address: Land Adjacent To Thorley Wash Cottage Thorley Street Thorley Bishops Stortford Hertfordshire CM23 4AS
pendingApplications.proposal: Variation of condition 2 (approved drawings), 3 (materials), 4 (detailed design drawings) and 5 (sustainable construction) attached to planning permission 3/21/1505/FUL (for Change of use of existing garage / annexe to create 1 dwelling. Raising of roof height. Part single storey, part two storey side and rear extensions, insertion of front dormers and front porch) - amendments allow minor changes to fenestration and submission of details for approval for conditions 3, 4 and 5)
